prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约327、366、440、319、332名。2021–2023年位次持续后移（327→440），2024年新高考首年大幅前移至319，2025年小幅后移至332，近两年波动区间319–332，整体呈高位震荡格局。2025年基准位次约332名；该校在吉林省理科组招生计划：2021年25人、2022年29人、2023年30人、2024年（物理类）32人、2025年（物理类）33人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势。但2026年计划骤降至21人，较2025年减少12人（-36.4%），为近六年最低，缩招幅度显著，将明显加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第6名（2021–2026年稳定在第5–6名），稳居全国顶尖高校前列，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为「偏负面」，主要涉及食堂帝王蟹定价争议及不为专硕提供宿舍等事件，但整体影响有限；抖音热度排名第17（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度持续较高；2022年曾出现专业组投档线差异舆情，但未见明显断档记录；南京大学拥有A+学科11个（天文学、地质学、图书情报与档案管理、中国语言文学、外国语言文学、物理学、化学、环境科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、工商管理、大气科学），A–及以上学科共26个，学科实力极强，对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业持续高热推荐，与南大优势学科高度契合；吉林省2026年高考总人数110868人，较2025年（111492人）微降约0.6%，按近年物理类占比约71%估算，物理类考生约78900人，较2025年（80421人）减少约1500人（-1.9%），竞争压力略有缓解；省控线方面，物理类本科批从2024年345分降至2025年340分，特殊类型控制线从483分降至479分，整体呈小幅下降趋势；南京大学位于江苏省南京市，非吉林省本地高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在吉林省招生人数占全国总招生比例约1%–2%，属外省招生正常水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次332名、2026年理科组大幅缩招36%（计划从33人降至21人）这一最关键影响因素，竞争显著加剧，位次必然前移；同时吉林省物理类考生总数略降、省控线小幅走低、学校声誉基本平稳，对位次前移幅度有一定缓冲。经，预测2026年理科组最低位次约290名，区间240–340名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 327, 366, 440, 319, and 332 respectively. Rankings continued to decline from 2021 to 2023 (327→440), then significantly advanced to 319 in 2024, the first year of the new college entrance exam, and slightly declined to 332 in 2025. In the past two years, the fluctuation range was 319–332, showing a high-level volatile pattern. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 332. The university's enrollment plan for science groups in Jilin Province: 25 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 32 in 2024 (physics category), and 33 in 2025 (physics category), showing a gradual slight expansion trend. However, the 2026 plan sharply drops to 21, a decrease of 12 (-36.4%) compared to 2025, the lowest in the past six years, with a significant reduction that will markedly intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 6th (stable at 5th–6th from 2021 to 2026), firmly among the top universities in China, strongly attracting high-scoring students. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance exam cycle is 'somewhat negative,' mainly involving controversies over the pricing of king crab in the cafeteria and the decision not to provide dormitories for professional master's students, but the overall impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 17th (high heat), with high short video exposure and sustained high attention for applications. In 2022, there was public opinion about differences in admission cutoffs for major groups, but no clear records of gaps. Nanjing University has 11 A+ disciplines (Astronomy, Geology, Library and Information Science and Archival Management, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Physics, Chemistry, Environmental Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Business Administration, Atmospheric Science) and a total of 26 disciplines rated A– or above, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, continuously attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other popular science majors continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with Nanjing University's advantageous disciplines. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance exam in Jilin Province is 110,868, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 2025 (111,492). Based on the recent physics category proportion of about 71%, the estimated number of physics category candidates is about 78,900, a decrease of about 1,500 (-1.9%) from 2025 (80,421), slightly easing competition pressure. Regarding provincial control lines, the physics category undergraduate batch dropped from 345 in 2024 to 340 in 2025, and the special type control line dropped from 483 to 479, showing a slight overall downward trend. Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Jilin Province, with no local enrollment bias. The university's enrollment in Jilin Province accounts for about 1%–2% of its total national enrollment, which is normal for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 332 and the most critical factor of a significant 36% reduction in the 2026 science group enrollment plan (from 33 to 21), competition will intensify markedly, and rankings will inevitably move forward. At the same time, the slight decrease in the total number of physics category candidates in Jilin Province, the slight decline in provincial control lines, and the generally stable university reputation will somewhat buffer the extent of the ranking advance. After comprehensive analysis, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 science group is approximately 290, with a range of 240–340.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Computer Science and Technology
- Science Experimental Class (Kuang Yaming Honors College, General Science Class)
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information
- Computer Science and Technology (Computer Finance Experimental Class)
- Technical Science Experimental Class
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematical and Physical Sciences).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Life Sciences)
- Industrial Engineering (Intelligent System Integration Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Nanjing University significantly reduces enrollment in the science group in Jilin Province. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 290, with a range of 240–340. Candidates with rankings within 240 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, Kuang Yaming Honors College). Those with rankings around 290 are advised to primarily target Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information and Mathematical and Physical Sciences, while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near 340 can consider Tier 3 majors like Engineering Experimental Class as a safety option. Note that all physics category majors in 2026 require chemistry as a subject selection; candidates should confirm their subject choices meet the requirements.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次158名、2026年文科组大幅扩招33%（计划从15人增至20人）这一最关键影响因素，竞争显著缓解，位次必然后移；同时历史类考生总数基本持平、省控线小幅上升、学校文科实力顶尖，对位次后移形成支撑。经，预测2026年文科组最低位次约170名，区间120–220名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年南京大学在吉林省文科组大幅扩招，预测最低位次约170名，区间120–220名。位次在120名以内可重点冲刺一档法学、经济管理试验班；位次在170名左右建议以二档人文科学试验班、汉语言文学为主；位次在220名附近仍有机会进入，建议以二档专业作为主要目标。文科组招生专业较少，各专业位次差距不大，考生可根据个人兴趣优先选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 132, 146, 140, 142, and 158 respectively. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 132 and 146 from 2021 to 2024, but shifted significantly to 158 in 2025, the highest (easiest to enter) in the past five years, showing a gradual backward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 158. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts groups in Jilin Province: 9 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 14 in 2024 (history category), 15 in 2025 (history category), showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan increases to 20, up 5 (+33.3%) from 2025, the highest in the past six years, with a significant expansion that will notably ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranking 6th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country, with strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts students. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'somewhat negative', mainly involving cafeteria and dormitory management incidents, but the overall impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 17th (high heat), with sustained high attention. In 2022, there was public opinion about differences in professional group admission cutoffs, but no obvious gaps were recorded. Nanjing University has outstanding liberal arts advantages: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Languages and Literatures A+, Philosophy A, Law A, Sociology A, Chinese History A, World History A–, Applied Economics A–, Journalism and Communication A–, Business Administration A+, with a total of 10 liberal arts disciplines rated A– or above, demonstrating top-tier academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature continue to be recommended as hot, while teacher training/education majors are in a wait-and-see state of differentiation. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Jilin Province is 110,868, slightly down from 2025. Based on the recent history category proportion of about 28%, the estimated number of history category candidates is about 30,900, roughly the same as 2025 (31,071). Regarding provincial control lines, the history category undergraduate batch rose from 369 points in 2024 to 384 points in 2025, and the special type control line rose from 479 points to 493 points, showing a slight upward trend. Nanjing University is located in Nanjing City, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Jilin Province. The number of students enrolled in the liberal arts group in Jilin Province has been increasing in recent years, with the 2026 plan of 20 being the highest ever, indicating an increased emphasis on Jilin liberal arts students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 158 and the most critical factor of a significant 33% expansion in the 2026 liberal arts group (plan from 15 to 20), competition will notably ease, and rankings will inevitably shift backward. Additionally, the total number of history category candidates is roughly stable, provincial control lines have slightly risen, and the university's liberal arts strength is top-tier, supporting the backward shift. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the 2026 liberal arts group will be about 170, with a range of 120–220.

- Law (International Legal Talent Experimental Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Nanjing University significantly expands its liberal arts group in Jilin Province, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 170, range 120–220. Candidates with rankings within 120 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Law and Economics and Management Experimental Class; those around 170 are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors like Humanities Experimental Class and Chinese Language and Literature; those near 220 still have a chance to enter, and should aim for Tier 2 majors as the main goal. The liberal arts group has few enrollment majors, with small ranking differences between majors, so candidates can prioritize based on personal interests.
